name: Fell off ladder at work, how do I file a workers comp claim?

mainEntity.name: Fell off ladder at work, how do I file a workers comp claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report to employer in writing, get their claim form, document everything, and follow up on approval.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Report the injury to your employer or supervisor immediately, preferably in writing, and complete your state's workers' comp claim form.[3]

Your employer must provide the form and notify their insurer; benefits start after approval for medical care and wage replacement.[2] Keep all medical records.

- Document the scene and witnesses.
- Attend required medical exams.
- Follow treatment plans.

Claims process varies by state but typically resolves in weeks; if denied, appeal within deadlines.[1] Hire a lawyer experienced in work injuries for guidance.

description: Report to employer in writing, get their claim form, document everything, and follow up on approval.[3]
